name: support-billing
description: Customer support — user reports a billing problem, agent opens a ticket. Calibrated against AnthropicExtractor v3 (temperature=0).

conversation.content: My invoice for April 2026 was charged twice — same amount on the 15th and 16th.
I see two charges on your account on April 15 and 16. I'll open a ticket and refund the duplicate.
Thanks. My customer ID is C-9182.

recall_queries.query: did this user report a duplicate charge
